title: pecteilis lacei
intro: Pecteilis lacei, also known as the Chinese orchid orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Pecteilis lacei are said to include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and promoting digestion, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory activities. In herbal preparations, Pecteilis lacei is often used in tea or decoction form to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
